scenes.title: SPRINGMARC
scenes.narration: Tour the floor plan, pick a style, and see the apartment before it exists.
scenes.fallback_narration: Tour the floor plan, pick a style, and see the apartment before it exists.
scenes.subtitle: SEE IT BEFORE IT IS BUILT.
scenes.original_narration: A warm, restrained Japandi approach that balances Scandinavian lightness with Japanese restraint to create a calm,. That is what Haus builds for Springmarc.

scenes.title: FLOOR PLANS
scenes.narration: Choose one, two, or three bedrooms, with pricing matched to each plan.
scenes.fallback_narration: Compare one, two, and three bedroom plans with clear starting prices.
scenes.subtitle: 1B1, 2B2, AND 3B2 AVAILABLE
scenes.original_narration: Choose one, two, or three bedrooms, with pricing matched to each plan.

scenes.title: LIVING
scenes.narration: Living: light oak (tables, low sofa base, shelving).
scenes.fallback_narration: Living: light oak (tables, low sofa base, shelving).
scenes.subtitle: WARM JAPANDI FAMILY CALM
must_include: reclaimed walnut sofa and coffee table
large potted plant (e.g., fiddle leaf fig)
brass floor lamp or sconce for warm practical glow
scenes.original_narration: Living: light oak (tables, low sofa base, shelving).

scenes.title: KITCHEN
scenes.narration: Kitchen: light oak (tables, low sofa base, shelving).
scenes.fallback_narration: Kitchen: light oak (tables, low sofa base, shelving).
scenes.subtitle: WARM JAPANDI FAMILY CALM
must_include: walnut cabinetry and minimal brass hardware
marble/honed counter vignette (cutting board, small herb)
walnut cabinet faces with minimal brass hardware
marble or honed stone counter vignette (cutting board, ceramics)
scenes.original_narration: Kitchen: light oak (tables, low sofa base, shelving).

must_include: gallery wall with warm ochre/orange art
gallery wall with warm accent art (ochre/orange)

scenes.title: HAUS FOR SPRINGMARC
scenes.narration: From floor plan to finished reel, Haus turns the vision into a tour.
scenes.fallback_narration: From floor plan to finished reel, Haus turns the vision into a tour.

scenes.original_narration: From floor plan to Warm Japandi Family Calm — light oak (tables, low sofa base, shelving), every room, buyer ready.
